exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.coachingCue: Drive through your heels and squeeze hard at the top. Control the descent.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
exercises.coachingCue: Place the dumbbell on your hips and drive upward. Full squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
exercises.coachingCue: Press through your heels, squeeze the glutes, hold for one second at the top.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your hips level. Drive through the heel of the working leg.

exercises.name: Cable Kickback
exercises.coachingCue: Lean forward slightly and kick directly back. Squeeze at full extension.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Kickback
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your core tight and kick back in a controlled arc. Feel the glute fire.

exercises.name: Leg Press (High Foot Placement)
exercises.coachingCue: Place feet high and wide. Push through heels. Feel the stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: Hip Abduction Machine
exercises.coachingCue: Sit tall and press knees out with control. Slow return.

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.coachingCue: Wide stance, toes out. Push the floor away and drive your hips forward at the top.

exercises.name: Donkey Kick
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your back flat and kick your heel toward the ceiling. Squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Frog Pump
exercises.coachingCue: Feet together and flat, knees out. Short range pump focusing on the glute contraction.

exercises.name: Cable Pull-Through
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge at the hips and pull the cable through with a powerful hip drive.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coachingCue: Push hips back like closing a door with your hips. Long spine throughout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coachingCue: Dumbbells stay close to your legs. Feel the hamstring stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Curl smoothly and squeeze hard at the top. Lower with control.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Keep your back flat against the pad and curl through full range.

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.coachingCue: Soft knee bend, hinge forward until torso is near parallel. Keep the bar against your traps.

exercises.name: Nordic Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Lower slowly resisting with your hamstrings. Use your hands to push back up.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Chest up, knees track over toes. Drive through the whole foot on the way up.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Hold the dumbbell at chest height. Sit between your heels and keep your chest tall.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Sit back and down like you are lowering into a chair. Keep weight in your heels.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Back foot elevated, front foot forward. Lower until back knee nearly touches the floor.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.coachingCue: Full extension at the top and a slow controlled lowering phase.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
exercises.coachingCue: Step forward and lower your back knee toward the floor. Stay upright.

exercises.name: Step Up
exercises.coachingCue: Drive through the heel of your front foot. Stand tall at the top.

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.coachingCue: Pull elbows to your back pockets. Keep wrists straight throughout.

exercises.name: Wide-Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.coachingCue: Lean back slightly and pull the bar to your upper chest. Lead with your elbows.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.coachingCue: Pull the handle to your lower sternum. Squeeze shoulder blades together at the end.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
exercises.coachingCue: Chest on the bench. Pull the dumbbell toward your hip, not your shoulder.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.coachingCue: Brace your core and row the dumbbell to your hip. Keep your torso still.

exercises.name: Back Extension
exercises.coachingCue: Round slightly at the top and extend with control. Squeeze glutes at the top.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge to 45 degrees and row the bar to your lower chest. Keep your back flat.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.coachingCue: Pull the rope to your face and externally rotate at the end. Slow and controlled.

exercises.name: Resistance Band Row
exercises.coachingCue: Anchor the band low and row both hands back toward your hips.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Lower dumbbells to chest level with control. Press up and slightly inward.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.coachingCue: Bench at 30-45 degrees. Press up and in. Squeeze the chest at the top.

exercises.name: Cable Chest Fly
exercises.coachingCue: Arms slightly bent, bring them together like hugging a tree. Feel the chest stretch.

exercises.name: Push-Up
exercises.coachingCue: Body in a straight line from head to heels. Lower with control and push through your palms.

exercises.name: Incline Push-Up
exercises.coachingCue: Hands on a bench or surface. Keep your body rigid and lower your chest toward the surface.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.coachingCue: Slight lean forward, raise arms to shoulder height. Lead with your elbows.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.coachingCue: Cable at the bottom. Raise arm across your body to shoulder height. Slow and controlled.

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.coachingCue: Elbows at 90 degrees to start. Press up until arms are almost fully extended.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
exercises.coachingCue: Raise to shoulder height with a slight bend in the elbow. Lower slowly.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.coachingCue: Arms straight out front. Pull the band apart until arms are fully open. Squeeze shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.coachingCue: Lower back pressed to floor. Extend opposite arm and leg simultaneously. Breathe out on extension.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.coachingCue: Straight line from head to heels. Squeeze everything. Breathe steadily.

exercises.name: Forearm Plank
exercises.coachingCue: Elbows under shoulders. Body in a straight line. Breathe and hold.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.coachingCue: On all fours. Extend opposite arm and leg keeping hips square. Hold briefly at the top.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.coachingCue: Hold the rope at your temples. Curl your spine — elbows to knees. Control the return.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.coachingCue: Hips up and forward. Stack your feet or stagger them. Breathe steadily.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.coachingCue: Press straight out from your chest and resist the rotation. Hold briefly at extension.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.coachingCue: Lower back pressed to the floor. Arms overhead, legs low. Breathe shallow and hold.

exercises.name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
exercises.coachingCue: Breathe into your belly and sides. Feel your ribcage expand 360 degrees. Slow exhale through pursed lips.

exercises.name: Pelvic Floor Activation
exercises.coachingCue: Think of lifting and squeezing gently from the inside. Breathe throughout. Release fully between reps.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows pinned to your sides. Full range, full squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Neutral grip, thumbs up. Curl and squeeze. Wrist-friendly alternative to standard curl.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Constant tension from the cable. Curl and squeeze, lower slowly.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.coachingCue: Elbows pinned to your sides. Push down and flare the rope slightly at the bottom.

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.coachingCue: Keep elbows close to your head. Lower behind your head and extend fully.

exercises.name: Tricep Dip (Bench)
exercises.coachingCue: Hands on a bench behind you. Lower your hips toward the floor and press back up.

exercises.name: Incline Treadmill Walk
exercises.coachingCue: Incline at 8-12 percent. Steady pace. Do not hold the rails.

exercises.name: Stair Climber
exercises.coachingCue: Full step through the whole foot. Keep an upright posture. Steady pace.

exercises.name: Stationary Bike
exercises.coachingCue: Moderate resistance. Keep a steady cadence. Breathe rhythmically.

exercises.name: Rowing Machine
exercises.coachingCue: Legs first, then lean back, then arms. Reverse on the return. Smooth chain throughout.

exercises.name: Gentle Walking
exercises.coachingCue: Comfortable pace. Focus on breathing and gentle movement.

exercises.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
exercises.coachingCue: Low lunge position. Tuck your tailbone and lean forward slightly into the stretch.

exercises.name: 90-90 Hip Stretch
exercises.coachingCue: Both legs at 90 degrees. Sit tall and fold over the front shin gently.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.coachingCue: Breathe in as you arch (cow), breathe out as you round (cat). Slow and fluid.

exercises.name: Child's Pose
exercises.coachingCue: Hips toward heels, arms stretched forward. Breathe into your back body.

exercises.name: World's Greatest Stretch
exercises.coachingCue: Step into a lunge. Place same-side hand on the floor and rotate opposite arm to the sky.

exercises.name: Wrist Circles
exercises.coachingCue: Slow controlled circles in both directions. Feel the full range of wrist motion.

exercises.name: Thoracic Rotation
exercises.coachingCue: Seated or on all fours. Rotate from your mid-back not your lower back. Follow your hand with your eyes.

exercises.name: Supported Wall Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Back against a wall. Feet forward. Lower to comfortable depth. Breathe steadily.

exercises.name: Seated Resistance Band Row
exercises.coachingCue: Sit tall on the floor or a chair. Row the band to your lower ribs. Squeeze your back.

exercises.name: Standing Hip Circle
exercises.coachingCue: Hands on hips. Draw slow circles with your hips. Great for relieving pelvic pressure.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.coachingCue: Seated in a chair. Rise onto toes and lower slowly. Helps with circulation during pregnancy.

exercises.name: Standing Dumbbell Lateral Raise (Light)
exercises.coachingCue: Very light weight. Raise to shoulder height and lower with full control.

exercises.name: Prenatal Side-Lying Hip Abduction
exercises.coachingCue: Lie on your side with a pillow for support. Lift the top leg with control. Safe at all trimesters.

exercises.name: Supported Standing Row (Band)
exercises.coachingCue: Anchor band at chest height. Stand and row both arms to your sides. Great for all trimesters.

exercises.name: Pelvic Tilt
exercises.coachingCue: Lying on your back with knees bent. Gently flatten your back to the floor and hold. Safe early pregnancy only.

exercises.name: Standing Pelvic Tilt
exercises.coachingCue: Stand with back against a wall. Gently tuck your tailbone and hold. Safe throughout pregnancy.

exercises.name: Supported Squat with Strap
exercises.coachingCue: Hold a strap or band anchored to a door. Lower into a deep squat with support. Excellent for third trimester.

exercises.name: Heel Slide
exercises.coachingCue: Lying on back. Breathe out and gently brace. Slide one heel away. Keep lower back still.

exercises.name: Clam Shell
exercises.coachingCue: Side lying with knees bent. Open the top knee like a clam. Keep feet together.

exercises.name: Standing March
exercises.coachingCue: Gentle march on the spot lifting knees to hip height. Breathe steadily.

exercises.name: Wall Push-Up
exercises.coachingCue: Hands at chest height on the wall. Lower your chest toward the wall and push back.

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Hammer Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Seated for stability. Neutral grip curls. Controlled pace.

exercises.name: Banded Glute Bridge
exercises.coachingCue: Band above knees. Drive hips up and press knees out against the band. Postpartum safe with pelvic floor activation.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coachingCue: Arch slightly, retract shoulder blades. Bar touches lower chest. Drive feet into the floor.

exercises.name: Conventional Deadlift
exercises.coachingCue: Bar over mid-foot. Hinge and grip. Legs push the floor away, then hips drive through at the top.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.coachingCue: Dead hang start. Pull chest to the bar. Lower fully between reps.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.coachingCue: Bar at collar bone. Press overhead and slightly back. Lock out at the top.

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge to 45 degrees. Row bar to lower chest. Keep back flat throughout.

exercises.name: Dip
exercises.coachingCue: Lean forward slightly for chest emphasis. Lower until upper arms are parallel to the floor.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Press
exercises.coachingCue: Bench at 30 degrees. Bar touches upper chest. Full press and controlled lowering.

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Feet shoulder-width at the bottom of the platform. Full depth and drive through heels.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.coachingCue: Grip the angled part of the EZ bar. Full curl and squeeze. Lower all the way down.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher
exercises.coachingCue: Lower bar to your forehead by bending only at the elbows. Press back to start.

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.coachingCue: Stand inside the trap bar. Hinge and grip. Push the floor away. More quad-dominant than conventional.

exercises.name: Pull-Up (Assisted)
exercises.coachingCue: Use band or machine for assistance. Pull chest toward the bar and lower fully.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.coachingCue: Start with palms facing you. Rotate palms outward as you press overhead. Reverse on the way down.

exercises.name: Incline Walk (Treadmill)
exercises.coachingCue: Incline 10-15 percent at a comfortable pace. Arms swinging naturally.

exercises.name: Cable Tricep Kickback
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge forward. Upper arm parallel to the floor. Extend and squeeze the tricep fully.

exercises.name: Reverse Fly
exercises.coachingCue: Hinge forward to 45 degrees. Raise arms out to the sides like wings. Lead with elbows.

exercises.name: Box Squat
exercises.coachingCue: Sit back to a box or bench. Touch and go — do not relax at the bottom. Drive back up.
